name: CORS Configuration
description: Configure CORS for an Express API: allowlist of origins per environment, preflight caching, credentials support, and logging for blocked origins to catch misconfigurations.

steps.description: Check existing CORS setup and middleware order
Create CORS options: origin function with env-based allowlist, credentials true, preflight cache 1 hour, log blocked origins
Apply cors(corsOptions) middleware before routes, handle OPTIONS preflight
Test allowed origin gets CORS headers, blocked origin gets 403, OPTIONS returns 204

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Precise CORS setup that works in dev, staging, and production without wildcards
